title: CT-3423

{{Quote|Commander Neyo (CC-8826) and CT-3423, accompanying Allie on speeder bike reconnaissance, received Order 66 and fired on the Jedi with the cannons of the BARC speeder operated by the 91st. Several blasts hit the rear of Allie's Aratech 74-Z speeder bike, igniting its reactor and sending it into a fatal crash.|[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Marcellin Wessel]], reporting to Emperor Palpatine|<ref name="Order 66" />}}
'''CT-3423''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was part of the [[91st Mobile Reconnaissance Corps/Legends|91st Reconnaissance Corps]] under [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Neyo/Legends|Neyo]] during the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Later, CT-3423 and Neyo went on a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder]] patrol of [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Stass Allie/Legends|Stass Allie]]. Through his [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|helmet]] [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], Neyo received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which branded the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] as traitors to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], and he informed CT-3423 of the order. CT-3423 and Neyo then utilized their [[BARC speeder/Legends|BARC speeders]]' [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] to fire on Allie's speeder, destroying it and [[Death/Legends|killing]] her.

==Biography==
CT-3423,<ref name="Order 66" /> like all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] as a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]]<ref name="SWE">{{SWE|groups|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} — Based on corresponding biographical and physical details for all [[clone trooper]]s</ref> of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] to fight for the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="Clone Databank" /> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], CT-3423 served in the [[91st Mobile Reconnaissance Corps/Legends|91st Reconnaissance Corps]] under [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Neyo/Legends|Neyo]].<ref name="Order 66" /> When [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Troop/Legends|troops]] [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|besieged]] the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world of [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], CT-3423 and the 91st Reconnaissance Corps were part of the invasion force.<ref name="db">{{DB|character|commanderneyo|Neyo, Commander}}</ref>

After the Republic won the battle,<ref name="siege">[[Republic 77|''Republic'' 77]]</ref> CT-3423 and Neyo began a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder]] patrol over the marshlands of the planet, along with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Stass Allie/Legends|Stass Allie]].<ref name="Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith" /> During the speeder reconnaissance, Neyo received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]—a directive branding the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] as traitors to the Republic, which called for all clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] to [[Death/Legends|execute]] their Jedi [[Officer/Legends|officers]]—from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] via [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|helmet]] [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. After Neyo informed CT-3423 of the order, both troopers utilized the [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] on their [[BARC speeder/Legends|BARC speeders]] to [[Laser/Legends|fire]] on Allie, hitting the rear of the Jedi's [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bike]]. This activated the [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] of the bike<ref name="Order 66" /> and caused it to crash, killing Allie.<ref name="Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith" />

==Personality and traits==
As a clone of Jango Fett,<ref name="Clone Databank" /> CT-3423 stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="SWE" /> He was able to [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] a BARC speeder and was loyal to Supreme Chancellor Palpatine over the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], carrying out Order 66 and killing Jedi Master Stass Allie.<ref name="Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith" /><ref name="Order 66" />

==Equipment==
CT-3423 wore Phase II clone trooper [[Armor/Legends|armor]] in combat<ref name="Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith" /> and carried a [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15S]] [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]].<ref name="Hasbro">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection|packtype=Battle Pack|pack=Treachery on Saleucami|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/tacbpsaleucami.asp}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
CT-3423 first appeared as an unnamed clone trooper in the [[2005]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].<ref name="Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith" /> His identification number was revealed in "[[Order 66: Destroy All Jedi]]," an article published in [[Star Wars Insider 87|''Star Wars Insider'' 87]].<ref name="Order 66" /> CT-3243 later appeared briefly in ''[[Star Wars: Republic: Into the Unknown]]''. In that [[Star Wars comic books|comic]], CT-3423 and Neyo are shown killing Allie in a rocky environment,<ref name="Unknown">[[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]]</ref> while in the film they are in a marshland.<ref name="Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith" /> Because film [[Canon|continuity]] overrides that of the comic,<ref name="Leland Chee SW.com">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?forumID=24&start=15&threadID=152583&msRange=15#5706120|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2004-01-21|time=9:16 AM}}</ref> this article presents the movie's version.
